e2ee.accessControl.autoLockTimeoutDesc: App will automatically lock after being inactive for a specified time
e2ee.accessControl.disabledDescription: Access control is off. Enabling it will require the master password after a lock event.
e2ee.accessControl.enabledDescription: Access control is enabled and currently verified.
e2ee.accessControl.lockOnStartupDesc: Force authentication when the app starts
e2ee.accessControl.lockedDescription: Access control is enabled and currently locked.
e2ee.accessControl.requireMasterPassword: Please set a master password before enabling access control.
e2ee.accessControl.title: Access Control
e2ee.accessControl.unavailable: The current environment does not support access control.
e2ee.accessControl.unlockDescription: Please enter the master password to verify access.
e2ee.alreadyHaveRecoveryKey: Already have a recovery key? Reset access
e2ee.error.dekNotUnlocked: Please unlock with the master password before syncing
e2ee.error.masterPasswordRequired: Cloud sync requires a master password. Please complete the setup on the "Security" page first.
e2ee.locked: Workspace is locked. Please enter the master password before syncing.
e2ee.masterPasswordDesc: The master password is the core credential for protecting your data. Please remember it.
e2ee.masterPasswordRequired:
After setting a master password, your data will be protected with end-to-end encryption.
All synced content is encrypted before upload, so the server cannot read your note content.
The master password is held only by you and is used for both local access verification and data decryption.
e2ee.passwordMismatch: The passwords entered do not match
e2ee.recoveryKey.description: Used to recover access if you forget your master password. Please keep it safe.
e2ee.recoveryKey.displayLabel: Please save this recovery key immediately
e2ee.recoveryKey.exported: Recovery key exported as a text file
e2ee.recoveryKey.regenerateVerifyDesc: Regenerating the recovery key requires verifying the master password. Once generated, the old recovery key will become invalid.
e2ee.recoveryKey.title: Recovery Key
e2ee.resetPasswordDescription: If you forget your master password, you can use the recovery key to reset it and restore access to your data.
e2ee.securityDescription: All synced data is encrypted locally before being uploaded to the remote server.
e2ee.securityStatusUnconfiguredDesc: Master password not yet set. Once set, you can enable cloud sync end-to-end encryption and local access control.
e2ee.unavailable: The current environment does not support the security module.
e2ee.unlockRecoveryLink: Forgot master password? Use recovery key
e2ee.unlockVerificationDescription: Please enter the master password to complete authentication before unlocking sync.

sync.error.connectionFailed: Unable to connect to cloud sync service
sync.error.notConfigured: Please complete the sync service configuration before performing sync
sync.error.remoteLocked: Another device is syncing the current workspace, please try again later
sync.notice.pendingRecovered: Recovered from the last interrupted sync session
sync.notice.keySlotsRestored: Encryption keys were restored from the sync target. Please unlock with your master password before syncing again.
text.aiAssistant: Intelligent completion and optimization based on input content (rewrite, polish, simplify, summarize); Tab to accept, Esc to cancel
text.aiAutoContinue: After accepting a suggestion, predict the next step based on the current context to achieve continuous completion
text.aiRAG: Build vector index based on note content to achieve intelligent semantic search and context enhancement
text.aiWritingMode.aggressive: Increase trigger frequency and response speed, shorten waiting time, suitable for writing scenarios that need frequent assistance
text.aiWritingMode.focus: Decrease trigger frequency and response speed, minimize interference, suitable for writing scenarios that need high focus
text.aiWritingMode.standard: Provide a balanced experience between response speed and stability, applicable to most writing scenarios
text.aiWritingScenario: Specify the scenario for content generation to make the output more suitable for actual needs and usage environment
text.aiWritingStyle: Control the expression style and wording of the content, affecting the overall tone and text style
text.autoIndent: Automatically maintain indentation when starting a new line
text.codeFolding: Allow folding code blocks and headings
text.importExportSettings: Import or export a Snaptium config package with settings and E2EE key slots
text.inputAllFields: Please fill in all required fields
text.logAutoClear: Automatically permanently delete log files exceeding the selected retention period
text.logLevelDesc: Only logs of the selected level or higher will be recorded
text.loggingEnabled: Record key operations and exception logs, logs are only saved locally
text.maxHistoryVersions: Maximum number of historical versions kept for each note
text.previewAllowHtml: Allow rendering raw HTML tags in preview; once closed, a stricter pure Markdown rendering mode will be used
text.previewAllowInlineSvg: Allow rendering common inline SVG tags for badges, icons, and vector graphics in preview
text.previewRemoteImages.all: Allow loading remote image resources from any source in preview, which has privacy and security risks, please enable with caution
text.previewRemoteImages.blocked: Prohibit loading any remote image resources in preview for maximum security
text.previewRemoteImages.trusted: Enable content security policy, only allow loading remote image resources from the whitelist in preview
text.previewTrustedSourcesHint: For security reasons, only HTTPS protocol remote image resources will be loaded in the preview
text.ragAdvanced: Used to configure knowledge base retrieval and chunking strategies. Adjusting parameters will affect retrieval results. Keeping defaults is recommended.
text.ragAutoIndex: Automatically index all notes at startup
text.ragAutoRebuildProgress: Vector model change detected, automatically rebuilding index ({current}/{total}, {progress}%)
text.ragChatModel: AI service used by the knowledge base intelligent Q&A model; disabling will only return knowledge base retrieval results
text.ragChunkOverlap: Number of overlapping characters between adjacent text blocks
text.ragChunkSize: Number of characters in each text block
text.ragEmbeddingModel: AI service for knowledge base content vectorization and context retrieval
text.ragIndexOnSave: Automatically update index when notes are saved
text.ragIndexStatus: View current index status and rebuild index
text.ragTopK: Number of most relevant text blocks returned
text.selectAIAssistantSourceName: AI service used for intelligent writing
text.showLineNumbers: Show line numbers on the left edge
text.showStatusBar: Show information such as word count, cursor, and size
text.snapshotInterval: Time interval for automatically generating note version snapshots
text.startupDefaultView: Choose the interface to enter by default when the application starts
text.syncAutoOnSave: Automatically trigger cloud sync after notes are saved
text.syncRemoteData: Provide end-to-end encrypted cross-device data synchronization, supporting WebDAV and S3 compatible object storage services
text.themeMode: Choose application interface theme, supporting Follow System, Light, and Dark themes
text.trashAutoClear: Automatically delete notes in the trash that exceed the set time limit
text.unitMilliseconds: Min wait time for intelligent completion
text.updateCheckInterval: Set time interval for automatic update checks
text.wordWrap: Automatic word wrap for long text

trash.emptyAllConfirm: Are you sure you want to permanently delete all notes in the trash? This operation cannot be undone, please proceed with caution.

workbench.empty.noActivity: Recent activities will be recorded here after you start writing
workbench.empty.noFavorites: Star notes from recent notes or related recommendations to pin them here
workbench.empty.noNotesBody: After creating your first note, the workbench will begin to form your writing entry point
workbench.empty.noKnowledgeTopics: A trending topics list will automatically form here once at least 2 notes mention the same topic
workbench.empty.noActiveTags: After you tag notes, recent active topic entries will appear here
workbench.empty.noQuestions: Semantic search with RAG enabled will record recent Q&A here
workbench.featured.fallback: Return to the most recent note and continue the draft
workbench.hero.focus: Continue creating and thinking in your knowledge space.
workbench.hero.quote.5: Give scattered ideas a place to return.
workbench.hero.quote.6: Write the part you can confirm now.
workbench.hero.quote.10: Save the question before the answer.
workbench.hero.quote.11: Organizing is not a pause; it clears the path.
workbench.hero.quote.12: Turn a vague thought into one sentence.
workbench.hero.quote.13: Leave today a clear entry point.
workbench.hero.quote.14: Writing starts with one small judgment.
workbench.hero.quote.15: Do not make it complete; keep it continuous.
workbench.hero.quote.16: Connect the clues and the idea gets clearer.
workbench.hero.quote.17: Move one key point forward today.
workbench.hero.quote.19: Write the facts first, then the view.
workbench.hero.quote.20: Break the complex question into the next step.
workbench.hero.quote.21: A note is a message to your future self.
workbench.hero.quote.25: Leave today's progress on the page.
workbench.hero.quote.26: Writing the question is already progress.
workbench.hero.quote.27: Give ideas a trail to follow.
workbench.hero.quote.30: Make the unfinished easy to continue.
workbench.insight.connection: AI found related themes in your recent writing.
workbench.startup.defaultToWorkbench: Enter workbench by default at startup
workbench.startup.defaultToWorkbenchHint: Enter workspace by default after cancellation
workbench.subtitle: Record every creation, continuously accumulate your knowledge and inspiration
